creator: marka@isc.org
text:
MOVED says to replace lang/clang with lang/clang32 or later.
	None of these, with the exception of lang/clang-devel if you want
	to live on the bleeding edge, install ccc-analyzer or scan-* which
	lang/clang did.  This is a regresssion.

	lang/clang||2013-12-22|Has expired: Migrate to lang/clang32 or newer

	/usr/local/bin/ccc-analyzer was installed by package clang-3.2_4
	/usr/local/bin/scan-build was installed by package clang-3.2_4
	/usr/local/bin/scan-view was installed by package clang-3.2_4

Fix: 

Update the Makefile to install these components.
